"#IranDeal is a hugely positive step at a time when problem-solving & danger reduction have rarely been so urgent." http://t.co/G9REsOGfye
.@JohnKerry: None of the problems we are concerned about will be made easier if the #IranDeal is rejected. http://t.co/vk6x5kHJno
"Important thing about #IranDeal is not what it will enable to Iran to do, but what it will stop Iran from doing."  http://t.co/2nO6olNnk8
.@JohnKerry: We'll be monitoring Iran nonstop. #IranDeal gives us a range of enforcement tools & we'll use them.   http://t.co/vB4yLrucCa
.@JohnKerry: We are telling Iran that it can’t have a nuclear weapon, period. #IranDeal http://t.co/ZsIKwkyQ6n
.@JohnKerry: The people of Israel will be safer with #IranDeal. The same is true for people throughout the region. http://t.co/NglG22rrQr
We are being bombarded with many myths regarding the #IranDeal. Here are the facts! http://t.co/9k2yHqG8am
.@JohnKerry: Rejecting @TheIranDeal would be a self-destructive blow to our nation’s credibility and leadership. http://t.co/IDn1jRqGgK
.@JohnKerry: Even the toughest restrictions didn’t stop Iran’s nuclear program from speeding ahead. #IranDeal http://t.co/w5CBCvFvUS
.@JohnKerry: For 20 years, @IAEAorg will be monitoring the production of key centrifuge components in #Iran.  http://t.co/3L9S1SXmob
Without #IranDeal, Iran would have several potential pathways to a bomb; with it, they won’t have any. -@JohnKerry http://t.co/ZLiJhcxysc
.@JohnKerry: Sanctions alone were failing to slow, let alone halt, Iran’s march toward a nuclear weapons capability. http://t.co/lcobYxSGom
.@JohnKerry: Two years ago we were facing an Iran that could arm ten to twelve bombs. #IranDeal http://t.co/w7qvaIQfa2
.@JohnKerry: @TheIranDeal will make the United States, Israel, the Gulf States, and the world safer. http://t.co/QyaLA7GQaA
.@JohnKerry: @POTUS and I are convinced that the framework we have put forward will get the job done. #IranDeal http://t.co/SMXzlUxvA8
